title: Living in Boulder Vlog 3 - 18 - 2017: 5 kilometer diameter in background

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about a stressful few days dealing with lost audiobooks (eventually recovering 82GB from Carbonite), working late nights on his website's timeline feature with color-coded 500-year blocks, dealing with car and apartment maintenance issues, financial stress around debt, and briefly mentions enjoying smoking weed while writing.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: storing drives vertically kills them — discs need to align with gravity
smoking weed slows proofreading but writing is still enjoyable; just requires more run-throughs
glad he had it — saved his audiobook collection when all other backups failed

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I took three days off because I got stressed out.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I couldn't transfer the audiobecause the guy said it didn't work.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I thought my files were backed up all over the place, but they weren't backed up anywhere.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My files weren't on any of my hard drives, my computer, or my other two computers.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The card is broken, and so is this old phone.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: There was 82 gigabytes on Carbonite, and I'm in the process of getting that back.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think I may have half of the files back already.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have to download the rest manually, but Carbonite backed up the folders so I know where to put them.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It's probably going to be like 400 books.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Three of my hard drives died at the same exact time.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Two of them are broken, and one is similar to broken.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got a new hard drive.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Don't store hard drives like this because the disc has to fight against gravity.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Hard drives should be in a line when they're stacked.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The background for my website is now five kilometers because the last one was two and a half kilometers.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My website is finally working for the first time.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My new computer is so much faster and makes the website look smaller.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was working on attaching areas to the distances for the different levels on my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: You can link directly to that part of the page and then see my timeline.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I saw a link on the timeline of all the countries I have for the timeline.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm adding links to all the different 500-year blocks with color-coded dots.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The dots make it easier to see the information.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I started on that last night and won't stop until I'm done.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was up until six in the morning working on it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I slept in until 11 because I was working late.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My mom called me to help her put away stuff.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got stressed out because I need money.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My mom has money, so I asked her for some.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I already paid $50 of interest this year and $250 last year.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I owe $11,600 here and $3,000 there.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My brother owes $16,000.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I haven't been motivated to work on my car because I got stressed out.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I fixed the curtains in my car.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My car breaks every time I fix something.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I fixed the light bulb in my car for no reason.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My curtain came down after I fixed the light bulb.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to fix the length of the curtain today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It'll make me feel like things are coming together.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I love smoking lots of weed and riding.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Smoking weed makes proofreading go really slow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Sometimes you go backwards and fix the same thing twice.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Proofreading is fun but takes longer because you have to do multiple run-throughs.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll start working on the length as soon as I fix this.
